mapper.select: select p.id as id,p.name as name,p.icon as icon,p.url as url, p.create_time as create_time,p.parent_id as parent_id,p.num as num,p.component as component from sys_role_permission,sys_user,sys_menu p WHERE sys_role_permission.item_id=p.id and sys_role_permission.role_id=sys_user.roleId and sys_user.id=#{userId} ORDER BY p.num
